content.content:
Done — I scheduled "Follow-up Meeting" on 2024-05-19 from 11:30 to 12:30 (1 hour). Description: "Follow-up to discuss action items from the Project Kick-off and next steps."

Notes:
- 10:00–11:00 is occupied by "Project Kick-off" and 11:00–11:30 by "One-on-One with Manager", so I scheduled the meeting at the next available one-hour slot that day (11:30–12:30).
- I included you (emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com) as the participant. If you want other participants added, specific location, or a different time, tell me who and I'll update it.
